comment.body:
hey i re-read dr Alma’s geo post, and i am just double clicking on something from the group here as i may have misinterpreted smthn myself. just looking for some clarity

alma writes: “Because, as I wrote, market must stabilize at the lower lvls, in order to give some times for the negative wealth effect to affect the economy. While slowly we can see that the tariffs war dust is about to settle. Not settling, but it is about to settle, the moment when EU withdraws its intention to build closer relationship with China as a response, and rather they chose to negotiate with the US.”

so when referring to the dust about to settle, doesn’t this dust settling mean that there is going to be a near term “agreement” of sorts? markets should love that

again mayhe i misunderstood. but the post starts off warning about earnings season, which it seems market is waiting on for its next move

comment.body:
yeah i got u. just trying to compartmentalize some stuff

makes sense if that comment was more an inference of like 2-3 months away 

the way i see it, and the way that makes sense with Alma’s timeline, although not putting words in her mouth is this;

Earnings come in with guidance a lot lower , market rolls over as it reprices

The federal reserve and treasury take notice and start to get a little “queasy”

EU gets hurt from US-knock on effect, and starts to realize they can’t get in bed with China long term. at the same time, treasury needs to figure out how to roll debt with the rates where they are (altho a lot of it is bills, i’ll admit)

..and that’s probably as far as i can see for now. SPX has a 4 in front of it during this post-earnings move tho
